provisions.title: Full text
provisions.content:
AIR NAVIGATION (NOISE CERTIFICATION AND
OPERATION OF AIRCRAFT) ORDER

[ L.S.499.18

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 499.18
AIR NAVIGATION (NOISE CERTIFICATION AND
OPERATION OF AIRCRAFT) ORDER*
1 ta’ April, 2002
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 162 ta’ l-2001, kif emendat bl-Avviżi Legali 83 ta’ l2004 u 411 ta’ l-2007 u bl-Att XL tal-2023.

*Dan l-Ordni ġie ppubblikat bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.

1
